title: CDO expression into OnePot PURE
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7hejk","text":"This protocol explains the procedure for expressing the catechol degrading enzyme Catechol-2,3-deoxygenase (CDO) into a \"homemade\" OnePot PURE cell-free transcription/translation system.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":82,"length":25},{"style":"italic","offset":108,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"21an8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9b083","text":"Once expressed, this enzyme degrades catechol, a colorless substrate, into a yellow colored one, 2-hydroxymuconate semialdyhyde (2-HMS), providing a colorimetric signal that can be easily  implemented in another protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e55q4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ii5c","text":"We used a CDO plasmid with A T7 promoter added to it.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fpcsq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fes13","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"fisvv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"381pj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4qgv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","0_1":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","0_2":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","0_3":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","1_0":"_dt-h-center","1_1":"_dt-h-center","1_2":"_dt-h-center","1_3":"_dt-h-center","2_0":"_dt-h-center","2_1":"_dt-h-center","2_2":"_dt-h-center","2_3":"_dt-h-center","3_0":"_dt-h-center","3_1":"_dt-h-center","3_2":"_dt-h-center","3_3":"_dt-h-center","4_0":"_dt-h-center","4_1":"_dt-h-center","4_2":"_dt-h-center","4_3":"_dt-h-center","5_0":"_dt-h-center","5_1":"_dt-h-center","5_2":"_dt-h-center","5_3":"_dt-h-center","6_0":"_dt-h-center","6_1":"_dt-h-center","6_2":"_dt-h-center","6_3":"_dt-h-center","7_0":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","7_1":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","7_2":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center","7_3":"_dt-bold _dt-h-center"},"colWidths":[50,50,50,50],"data":[["Materials µl","CDO expression    \n (1)","Control without plasmid (2)","Control without catechol (3)"],["Energy solution","2","2","2"],["Ribosomes","0.9","0.9","0.9"],["Proteins","0.65","0.65","0.65"],["CDO Plasmid","25 ng","-","25 ng"],["Catechol 10mM","0.5","0.5","-"],["Water","up to 5 µl","up to 5 µl","up to 5 µl"],["Total","5","5","5"]],"guid":"BC848DE0DF6711E98DEC2BF8A6437FD7","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23],"show_headers":true}}}}
steps: Label 3 PCR tubes according to the reactions
Add the catechol, CDO and water as needed according to the materials chart.
Make a quick spin in the centrifuge to have all the liquid in the bottom.
In each tubes add the Energy solution, proteins and ribosomes.
creator: Dana Mozaffari
